name: Jail
hints: The jail! The Golden Derringer treasure is here, plus a locked door.
GET DERR for the Golden Derringer treasure. The locked door leads to a cell.
OPEN DOOR or UNL DOOR with a key to access the cell with a hammer inside.
GET DERR. The cell (room 14) has a hammer. N=town (1).
notes: Jail with Golden Derringer treasure and locked door to cell (room 14). N=town (1).
